{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032205301347D617400CAC80A39A98"}"},"total":51},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7530090995290506009","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常好看，爽文，纯纯的末世爽文，火力覆盖的那种，并且不压主角实力。基本以作战部队的视角以收复失地为主来写。主角的存在感比较低的，主角的作用差不多是靠系统来补充物资之类。
这个是重点：看这本书的时候尽量不要把人心想到太坏，这区别与其他书可能不太一样。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1753240666,"group_id":"7519855025510698046","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwMfBIWNil5Wpa0ixiZ7Ec2JgUw1kXTV6a2/seiGiXob","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/792f9b1104ee4683b0ac5615273affe4~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776710355&x-signature=5VYaicKTxriNio0%2BQoh6HnM2b5I%3D","user_id":"3896277210767263","user_name":"不chuan苦茶子"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3896277210767263","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1755189224,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7519855025510698046","book_info":{"abstract":"丧尸+系统+现代军队+无异能
原本只存在于科幻电影里的丧尸病毒席卷全球，而在这种情况下，末世前只是一名普通路过的假面...，一名普通的网文作者和他的士兵们又会在这疯狂的世界掀出怎样的浪花呢，请各位看官移步正文。
作者文笔很差，是个军迷但不是资深的那种，也是第一次写文，文内部队组成主要是老美的，或许后期还会加入些大毛的，别问为什么不写自家的，问就是写不来，自家部队文有大佬写，而且写的比我好，不敢关公面前耍大刀。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/ce6c245eed48cf8a038513c048cae0b4","author":"love遐蝶","author_id":"","book_id":"7519855025510698046","book_name":"末世，从获得三角洲特种部队开始","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#98a0a8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2002人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7519877297294279230","read_count":"2002","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"356292"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.6","serial_count":"161","tags":"科幻末世,末世,系统,求生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o01369140924414a26d44ee6d1bdc5693~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779312613&x-signature=9sdZOE%2B42FJ%2B8ovR6et4BmIQ5Uc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"68440921251","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"86"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032205301347D617400CAC80A39A98"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":19724,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":20190,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":5233},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_reply_time":1753249753,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_
